_doc: Data synthesis control — canonical/ is the single source of truth

GAME.notes: v13: NO think chains. 3 fixes: liars call-first 13%, gin 1026 entries 95% knock (v8 data), leduc 4% fold (247 augmented). goofspiel 2000, leduc 2247, liars 3351, gin 1026, hex 2106, othello 1321, clobber 5193. HF synced.
GAME.audit: 2026-03-27: v13 all quality gates pass. gin knock 95%✅, leduc fold 4%✅, liars call-first 13%✅, think=0✅. Top miner analysis: full fine-tune, no think, strategy-aware.

NAVWORLD.notes: V8 generating. 4661 canonical (+491 batch3). Target 10K per user request. ~94% success rate (API 500/502 errors). Batch 4 launching.
NAVWORLD.audit: 2026-03-27: 4330 canonical. All 160 new entries validated. 100% tool coverage.

SWE-INFINITE.notes: 1118 canonical. 40 workers on m1. 499/3606 attempted, 38% success. GPT-5.4. Poll 6h.

LIVEWEB.notes: v20 AUDITED. 17108 entries (downsampled from 25205). Capped 200/template, removed 8097 near-dupes. 4161 unique templates. 0% think. HF synced.
LIVEWEB.audit: 2026-03-27: deep audit. 46% near-dupes removed. 35 templates capped at 200. All 17108 pass validation. HF synced.
